## 改动类型 / Type of Change

<!-- 请勾选适用项 / Please check applicable items -->

- [ ] Bug 修复 / Bug fix
- [ ] 新功能 / New feature
- [ ] 前端 UI / Frontend UI
- [ ] 后端改进 / Backend improvement
- [ ] 文档 / Documentation
- [ ] 重构 / Refactoring
- [ ] 测试 / Tests
- [ ] 安全相关 / Security related

## 自检清单 / Checklist

<!-- 提交前请确认所有项 / Please confirm all items before submitting -->

- [ ] 我的代码遵循项目的代码风格 / My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] 我的代码使用**中文（简体）** 注释，注明"做什么"和"为什么" / My code uses **Chinese (Simplified)** comments, explaining "what" and "why"
- [ ] 我已运行 `dart analyze lib`，返回 **0 error** / I ran `dart analyze lib` with **0 errors**
- [ ] 我的改动没有破坏现有功能 / My changes do not break existing functionality
- [ ] 如果修改了后端逻辑，我已运行相关测试 / If backend logic was modified, I ran relevant tests
- [ ] 我已更新相关文档（如适用）/ I updated relevant documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] 我的提交信息遵循约定式提交格式 / My commit messages follow conventional commits format
- [ ] 我没有提交 `.env` 文件或任何敏感信息 / I did not commit `.env` file or any sensitive information
